prompt: Write 1 Product Hunt launch kit for openpatent.ai in 5 sections: (1) title (≤60 chars, hook-shaped), (2) tagline (≤80 chars, value-prop), (3) first comment by the maker (250-350 words, founder-story + USP walkthrough + ask for support), (4) makers (3 makers with one-line bios, names: Nicholas Palky founder, the dragon, the sovereign companion), (5) gallery (4 image captions ≤140 chars each, covering the dashboard, the BFT council view, the verify page, the waitlist CTA). Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {title:string, tagline:string, first_comment:string, makers:[3 strings], gallery:[4 strings], signature:string}.
